title: SurviveZ
description: Survive-Z is the ultimate zombie survival modpack with realistic firearms, supply drops and randomized loot!
body:
![Survive-Z logo over a ruined city background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e908804d5c904b3c616c34b5f06e8e2c8dd248ba.jpeg)

_Survive-Z is a themed modpack designed for the ultimate single-player zombie survival experience. It's all about staying alive for as long as possible until the next supply drop!_

## Features

- 50+ different zombies with random modifiers and increased awareness, including mutant mobs and other mini bosses.
- 25+ realistic firearms and auto-turrets.
- An exclusive datapack, custom made for this modpack, that introduces falling meteors with an iron core that can be repurposed for ammo.
- An endless abandoned city with a perpetual night cycle.
- A carefully crafted game loop, including starting gear, custom mob drops and timed supply crates.
- Immersive visual effects and sound design.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UFaVtt7FbIM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Setting

The Lost Cities are filled with modified zombies and spiders crawling around in the dark. You can already hear their groans reverberating through the darkness.

![Zombies and spiders in a dark underground tunnel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ebd58202efadec192b5fb2332248a87ef2a1f08.jpeg)

A mysterious catastrophe in the distant past plunged the world into an eternal night, enabling undead mobs to persist for longer and eventually develop heightened senses.

![Player aiming a pistol at a zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26eb98b359eb5e44f9fbb3ae09896dab9b95c57b.jpeg)

They are the monsters you were sent to fight against as the lone survivor of a secret military operation to take back the city.

![A ruined city with buildings extending into the distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d81c2b036aab28fa5460a284453f2c24a85c906.jpeg)

## Gear

Armed with your trusty pistol and knife, you will be forced to eliminate and loot the zombified monsters that once were the city's inhabitants to obtain new weapons and ammo that may prove essential to stay alive in this hostile world.

![Firearms displayed inside item frames on a wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df4f94bf6834ae301bd39050ad373bfcac653c61.jpeg)

After the first ten minutes of intense combat, you hear the sound of a broadcast comm regarding a supply crate about to land in the center of the map. You make your way there, hoping to find anything that can help in your fight against the undead.

![Supply crate with one turret on each side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2014f51e9601c64d0207cf22cc4fdca485771b75.jpeg)
